author: sumaiyanaazim
name: 10L MLP3x BigramHash SWA LateQAT WD
blurb: Standard 10-layer transformer (dim=416, MLP 3x, GQA 8q/4kv) + BigramHash(4096) for bigram context + SWA from 40% of training + late QAT at 85% wallclock + weight decay 0.04. No depth-recurrence — clean independent layers for stable training.
